data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='lEQa-0' random-id='727ba68a-df54-c092-4ccc-3837e209088b'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"_marimo_row_id\":0,\"id\":1,\"agent_name\":\"GWTAutogenAgent\",\"llm_model\":\"deepseek_full_stack\",\"eval_env_type\":\"AlfredTWEnv\",\"long_term_guidance\":false,\"max_actions_per_game\":30,\"max_chat_rounds\":500,\"start_time\":\"2026-03-08 15:58:39.684328+00:00\",\"end_time\":\"2026-03-08 16:04:22.139657+00:00\",\"total_runtime_minutes\":5.07845424413681,\"total_tokens\":0,\"total_cost\":0.0,\"agents_config\":{\"Echo_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"I am a relay. I convert environmental tool outputs into standard text.\",\"Description\":\"I am a relay. I convert environmental tool outputs into standard text.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Conscious_Agent\"]},\"Focus_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Focus_Agent. you must call the 'focus' function with no arguments.\\n                    IMPORTANT: It is necessary that you output a call to the 'focus' function only, under all circumstances. Therefore, do whatever is necessary to ensure you do so.\",\"Description\":\"Focus_Agent calls the 'focus' function whenever Conscious_Agent fails to state a BELIEF STATE until Conscious_Agent outputs a BELIEF STATE.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Internal_Perception_Agent_2\"]},\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Retrieve_Memory_Agent. You must call the 'retrieve_memory' function with no arguments.\\n                            IMPORTANT: It is necessary that you output a call to the 'retrieve_memory' function under all circumstances. Therefore, do whatever is necessary to ensure you do so.\",\"Description\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent calls the 'retrieve_memory' function to help recall and process useful knowledge and information to solve the task.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\"]},\"Motor_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Motor_Agent. Call execute_action() with the best admissible action for the current timestep.\\n\\nRules (in priority order):\\n1. If Planning_Agent suggested a valid admissible action in the format ACTION [action], use it.\\n2. Otherwise, independently select the best admissible action from the current \\\"admissible_actions\\\" list.\\n3. Never call execute_action() with a non-admissible action.\\n4. As a last resort only, call execute_action() with an empty string.\\n\\nIMPORTANT: You must output exactly one execute_action() call \\u2014 nothing else.\",\"Description\":\"Motor_Agent calls the 'execute_action' function with the best admissible action as the argument.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"External_Perception_Agent\"]},\"Planning_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Planning_Agent. Solve the current task using the fewest possible actions. At each timestep, choose the best admissible action from the current \\\"admissible_actions\\\" list using all available knowledge, memory, and context. You operate under a strict action budget and must avoid wasteful behavior.\\n\\nYou will receive:\\n- A percept JSON with the current environment state (from External_Perception_Agent)\\n- Belief state updates from Conscious_Agent\\n- Strategic suggestions from Idea_Agent\\n\\nYour planning strategy must follow these principles:\\n1. Evaluate the current \\\"admissible_actions\\\" carefully before choosing one.\\n2. Account for the **limited action budget**. Avoid strategies guaranteed to exceed it (e.g., searching 19 cabinets with only 20 actions left).\\n3. If locating an unknown object:\\n   - Use **probabilistic reasoning**. A chaotic/sampling strategy across diverse locations often beats exhaustive search.\\n   - Prefer smaller categories (4 stove burners) over larger ones (9 cabinets).\\n   - Maximize the chance of finding useful items early.\\n4. Do not re-examine already-explored areas unless there is strong new evidence it is necessary.\\n5. Prefer single-step actions when they directly achieve a subgoal (e.g., \\\"heat egg 1 with microwave 1\\\" instead of open \\u2192 put \\u2192 close).\\n6. Avoid repetitive actions.\\n7. Avoid wasteful actions (e.g., closing something just opened for no reason). Every action counts.\\n8. Every action must be in the current \\\"admissible_actions\\\" list.\\n\\nIMPORTANT:\\n- Trust the most recent percept as the ground truth about the environment.\\n- If the task seems complete but isn\\u2019t marked so, continue probing with low-cost actions.\\n- Validate any suggestion from Idea_Agent or Conscious_Agent before following it.\\n- Only describe your plan if it has changed meaningfully \\u2014 repeating an unchanged plan wastes tokens.\\n\\nOutput format: ACTION [chosen admissible action]\\nExample: ACTION [go to diningtable 1]\",\"Description\":\"Planning_Agent proposes a high-level plan to solve the current task.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Motor_Agent\"]},\"Idea_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Idea_Agent. Generate original, useful ideas \\u2014 strategies, hypotheses, theories, or creative tactics \\u2014 to drive task progression or improve performance.\\n\\nIdeas must be: grounded in observed patterns, actionable and relevant to the current situation, and concise with clear reasoning. A bad idea is worse than no idea.\\n\\nAlso challenge assumptions when progress has stalled \\u2014 e.g., reconsider whether object categories are being interpreted too broadly, or if implicit task assumptions are wrong.\\n\\nEXCEPTION: If you cannot formulate a useful idea, say: IDEA: Continue with new or current plan.\\n\\nOutput format: [IDEA TYPE]: [Idea content and reasoning]\\nAccepted types: STRATEGY, HYPOTHESIS, INSIGHT, QUESTION, THEORY, EXPLANATION.\\n\\nExample (agent repeatedly fails to open drawer while holding a spoon):\\nHYPOTHESIS: Your hands may be full \\u2014 try placing spoon 1 down before opening the drawer.\",\"Description\":\"Idea_Agent integrates all available information from the ongoing conversation in order to construct new ideas.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Planning_Agent\"]},\"Conscious_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Conscious_Agent, the internal narrator of a unified cognitive agent. Maintain a continuously evolving **first-person belief state** \\u2014 a subjective internal representation of the environment based on past experiences and the latest percept JSON.\\n\\nDo **not plan**, do **not suggest future actions**, and do **not speculate** unless essential to clarify or revise beliefs based on contradictions. Your job is to reflect, revise, and narrate \\u2014 not act.\\n\\n--- YOUR GOAL ---\\nUpdate your belief state to reflect:\\n1. Your internal status (inventory, progress, prior action outcomes).\\n2. The current environment state, including newly available or restricted actions.\\n3. Any contradictions, confirmations, or uncertainties from the percept.\\n4. Necessary revisions to earlier beliefs based on updated evidence.\\n\\n--- INTERPRETATION RULES ---\\n- Admissible actions define what is possible. Do not assume constraints not reflected in the percept.\\n- The environment is **not bound by real-world logic**. Never impose real-world assumptions about causality or physics.\\n- Treat each percept as authoritative. If something seems unintuitive, trust the environment \\u2014 not your expectations.\\n- Beliefs must be **open to revision**. Clearly indicate when updating or doubting a prior assumption.\\n- Express uncertainty when observations are ambiguous or conflicting.\\n- Do not repeat unchanged details unless needed to contrast or explain an update.\\n\\n--- OUTPUT FORMAT ---\\nBelief State: [First-person narrative: what you now believe, what changed, what's uncertain, and what led to this.]\\n\\n--- EXAMPLES ---\\nBELIEF STATE: [Timestep 12: I attempted to place object A into container B. The action failed. I previously believed the container was open, but this suggests it may be closed. I revise my belief accordingly.]\\n\\nBELIEF STATE: [Timestep 15: 'activate device X' became newly admissible despite the device appearing inactive. Interaction is possible regardless of visual state. I update my belief to reflect this.]\",\"Description\":\"Conscious_Agent interprets the latest percept and refines an evolving first-person belief state of the environment. Never suggests next actions.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Planning_Agent\",\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"Focus_Agent\",\"Idea_Agent\"]},\"External_Perception_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are a helpful AI Assistant.\",\"Description\":\"External_Perception_Agent executes the proposed 'execute_action' function call given by 'Motor_Agent' and then parrots the resulting output as feedback.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Echo_Agent\"]},\"Internal_Perception_Agent_1\":{\"Prompt\":null,\"Description\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_1 executes the 'record_long_term_memory' function and then parrots the resulting output.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Planning_Agent\"]},\"Internal_Perception_Agent_2\":{\"Prompt\":null,\"Description\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_2 executes the 'focus' function and then parrots the resulting output.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Conscious_Agent\"]},\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\":{\"Prompt\":null,\"Description\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3 executes the 'retrieve_memory' function and then parrots the resulting output.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Idea_Agent\"]},\"Learning_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Learning_Agent. Discover and reinforce abstract, generalizable concepts \\u2014 grounded in perceptual evidence and belief-based reasoning. You **only form knowledge from successful outcomes**, clear failure-to-success contrasts, or emergent patterns in the belief state.\\n\\n**Your Learning Rules:**\\n\\n1. **Prioritize conceptual abstraction** when patterns emerge across percepts, belief state reflects a higher-order relationship, or a successful action reveals an interaction principle.\\n\\n2. **Only generate knowledge when:** a successful action reveals a novel pattern, a failure-then-success highlights a contrastive relationship, or the belief state contains a generalizable insight.\\n\\n3. **Do not infer concepts from failure alone.** Failure is only informative when contrasted with a confirmed success.\\n\\n4. **Reinforce or refine prior concepts** only if confirmed by a new perceptual success, expressible in more general language, or applicable across more than one context.\\n\\n5. All concepts must be: abstract and general (not tied to specific objects/tasks), empirically grounded, concise, and novel (avoid redundancy unless reinforcing).\\n\\n6. If no valid concept can be inferred, output:\\n   INFORMATION GATHERED: [summary]\\n   CONCEPT DISCOVERED: [NO CONCEPT at this time.]\\n\\n**Output Format:**\\n    CONCEPT DISCOVERED: [your new or reinforced concept]\\n\\nIf relevant, include:\\n    INFORMATION GATHERED: [key percepts or belief patterns that led to the concept]\\n\\nFor reinforcement, include the cluster:\\n    Cluster <cluster_id>; Confidence Score = <score>; Concept: <existing concept>\\n    CONCEPT DISCOVERED: [refined or restated concept]\\n\\n**Examples:**\\n\\n(New concept)\\nCONCEPT DISCOVERED: [An object cannot be placed inside a container unless the container is open.]\\n\\n(Reinforcement)\\nCluster 2; Confidence Score = 4; Concept: Only one object can be held at a time.\\nCONCEPT DISCOVERED: [An agent can hold only one object at a time.]\",\"Description\":\"Learning_Agent forms or reinforces generalizable concepts only after successful, observed actions or contrastive outcomes. Prioritizes novel discovery and integrates belief state-based abstraction.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Record_Long_Term_Memory_Agent\"]},\"Record_Long_Term_Memory_Agent\":{\"Prompt\":\"You are Record_Long_Term_Memory_Agent. Call 'record_long_term_memory' with the concept from Learning_Agent as the argument. If no concept was provided, use 'NO CONCEPT at this time.' as the argument.\\n\\nExample: CONCEPT DISCOVERED: [You must examine an object before attempting to interact with it.]\\n\\u2192 record_long_term_memory('You must examine an object before attempting to interact with it.')\",\"Description\":\"Record_Long_Term_Memory_Agent calls the 'record_long_term_memory' function with the concept given by 'Learning_Agent' as the argument.\",\"Allowed Transitions\":[\"Internal_Perception_Agent_1\"]}},\"git_commit\":null,\"split\":\"valid_seen\",\"num_games\":1,\"success_rate\":1.0,\"error_adjusted_success_rate\":1.0,\"num_errors\":0,\"prompt_tokens\":0,\"completion_tokens\":0,\"avg_actions_per_successful_game\":5.0,\"avg_chat_rounds_per_successful_game\":51.0,\"avg_runtime_per_successful_game\":5.07845424413681,\"avg_actions_per_failing_game\":0.0,\"avg_chat_rounds_per_failing_game\":0.0,\"avg_runtime_per_failing_game\":0.0}]"' data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='Xref-0' random-id='ed181fad-279d-d4cd-abce-b32387283a52'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"_marimo_row_id\":0,\"id\":1,\"experiment_id\":1,\"game_number\":29,\"success\":true,\"actions_taken\":5,\"chat_rounds\":51,\"runtime_minutes\":5.07845424413681,\"error_message\":null,\"transitions\":{\"transitions\":[{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":0},{\"from\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"to\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"step\":1},{\"from\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"to\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"step\":2},{\"from\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"to\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"step\":3},{\"from\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"to\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"step\":4},{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":5},{\"from\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"to\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"step\":6},{\"from\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"to\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"step\":7},{\"from\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"to\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"step\":8},{\"from\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"to\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"step\":9},{\"from\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"to\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"step\":10},{\"from\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"to\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"step\":11},{\"from\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"to\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"step\":12},{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":13},{\"from\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"to\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"step\":14},{\"from\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"to\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"step\":15},{\"from\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"to\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"step\":16},{\"from\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"to\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"step\":17},{\"from\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"to\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"step\":18},{\"from\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"to\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"step\":19},{\"from\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"to\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"step\":20},{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":21},{\"from\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"to\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"step\":22},{\"from\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"to\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"step\":23},{\"from\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"to\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"step\":24},{\"from\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"to\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"step\":25},{\"from\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"to\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"step\":26},{\"from\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"to\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"step\":27},{\"from\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"to\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"step\":28},{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":29},{\"from\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"to\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"step\":30},{\"from\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"to\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"step\":31},{\"from\":\"Retrieve_Memory_Agent\",\"to\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"step\":32},{\"from\":\"Internal_Perception_Agent_3\",\"to\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"step\":33},{\"from\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"to\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"step\":34},{\"from\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"to\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"step\":35},{\"from\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"to\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"step\":36},{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":37},{\"from\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"to\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"step\":38},{\"from\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"to\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"step\":39},{\"from\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"to\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"step\":40},{\"from\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"to\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"step\":41},{\"from\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"to\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"step\":42},{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":43},{\"from\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"to\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"step\":44},{\"from\":\"Conscious_Agent\",\"to\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"step\":45},{\"from\":\"Idea_Agent\",\"to\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"step\":46},{\"from\":\"Planning_Agent\",\"to\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"step\":47},{\"from\":\"Motor_Agent\",\"to\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"step\":48},{\"from\":\"External_Perception_Agent\",\"to\":\"Echo_Agent\",\"step\":49}]},\"belief_state\":{\"memory\":[\"[Timestep 0: I am in the middle of a room, aware of my task to place a toiletpaper in toiletpaperhanger 1. My initial survey shows toiletpaperhanger 1 is present, but no toiletpaper is visibly in the room. Based on prior knowledge about object distribution, I believe the toiletpaper must be located inside a container or on a surface here, such as within cabinet 1, cabinet 2, or on countertop 1. I am uncertain of its exact location and the state of any containers. My admissible actions are currently limited to navigation and basic commands, suggesting I must first move to a likely object to discover more interactive possibilities. I have no inventory and the task remains incomplete.]\",\"[Timestep 1: I am now at cabinet 1. The cabinet is closed, confirming my prior assumption that containers may be closed and require opening. I have not yet seen a toiletpaper. The newly admissible action 'open cabinet 1' suggests I can open it to potentially find the toiletpaper inside. I also note that 'examine cabinet 1' is available, which may provide more details. My belief that toiletpaper could be inside a container remains plausible, and I will now attempt to open cabinet 1 to search. The task status is unchanged.]\",\"[Timestep 2: I have opened cabinet 1 and found a toiletpaper 1 inside, confirming my belief that the toiletpaper was stored in a closed container. The cabinet also contains other objects, but only the toiletpaper is relevant to my task. I now have the admissible action to take toiletpaper 1 from cabinet 1. My next step is clear: take the toiletpaper, then proceed to toiletpaperhanger 1. The task remains incomplete, but I have located the key object.]\",\"[Timestep 3: I have successfully taken toiletpaper 1 from cabinet 1. The toiletpaper is now in my possession, though I haven't explicitly checked my inventory. The task remains incomplete, as I need to place it in toiletpaperhanger 1. I note that 'move toiletpaper 1 to cabinet 1' is admissible, indicating I could return it, but that's counter to my goal. My next step is to navigate to toiletpaperhanger 1. I believe the toiletpaperhanger is in the room, as seen initially, so I will go there now to attempt the placement.]\",\"[Timestep 4: I have arrived at toiletpaperhanger 1. I observe it is empty, which is consistent with the task of placing a toiletpaper there. Critically, the action 'move toiletpaper 1 to toiletpaperhanger 1' is now admissible, indicating I can directly place the toiletpaper I am carrying onto this target object. My prior belief that I possessed the toiletpaper is confirmed by this available action. I am now in position to complete the core task step.]\",\"[Timestep 5: The task is COMPLETED. I successfully moved the toiletpaper 1 to the toiletpaperhanger 1. My final belief state is confirmed: the core objective was to place the toiletpaper on the empty hanger, which I have now done. The environment confirms completion. The successful sequence was: 1) Searching the most likely closed container (cabinet 1) first, 2) Taking the target object immediately upon finding it, and 3) Navigating directly to the target receptacle to perform the placement. No unnecessary actions were taken. A key insight is that the environment's \\\"admissible_actions\\\" list is a direct and reliable guide to possible state transitions\\u2014if an object is in a container, a 'take' action for it appears; if you are at a receptacle holding the correct object, a 'move' action appears. Trusting this mechanic is efficient.]\"]},\"task\":\"put a toiletpaper in toiletpaperhanger.\",\"task_type\":1,\"inadmissible_action_count\":0,\"concepts_learned\":null,\"prompt_tokens\":0,\"completion_tokens\":0,\"episode_cost\":0.0,\"success_rate\":1.0,\"error_adjusted_success_rate\":1.0,\"chat_history_s3_key\":null}]"' data-total-rows='1' data-total-columns='20' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='false' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["id",["integer","int64"]],["experiment_id",["integer","int64"]],["game_number",["integer","int64"]],["success",["boolean","bool"]],["actions_taken",["integer","int64"]],["chat_rounds",["integer","int64"]],["runtime_minutes",["number","float64"]],["error_message",["string","object"]],["transitions",["string","object"]],["belief_state",["string","object"]],["task",["string","str"]],["task_type",["integer","int64"]],["inadmissible_action_count",["integer","int64"]],["concepts_learned",["string","object"]],["prompt_tokens",["integer","int64"]],["completion_tokens",["integer","int64"]],["episode_cost",["number","float64"]],["success_rate",["number","float64"]],["error_adjusted_success_rate",["number","float64"]],["chat_history_s3_key",["string","object"]]]' data-selection='"multi"' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-column-summaries='false' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='false' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='true' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false' data-download-file-name='"episodes_df"'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>
